nasb.text: and if it spreads farther on the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean; it is an infection.

esv.text: And if it spreads in the skin, then the priest shall pronounce him unclean; it is a disease.

cnv.text: 如果在皮膚上蔓延，祭司就要宣布他為不潔淨；這就是痲風病。

ccb.text: 隔离期间，若患处扩散，祭司要宣布他是不洁净的，是患了麻风病。
